video.title: Video
video.description: A video entity for the private streaming website

description.description: Detailed description of the video content

videoUrl.description: Direct link or embed URL of the video stream

duration.description: Duration formatted as MM:SS or HH:MM:SS

views.description: Number of times the video has been viewed

uploadedAt.description: Date or relative time when the video was uploaded

isFeatured.description: Whether this video is highlighted in the featured hero section

isTrending.description: Whether this video is highlighted in the trending section

/videos/{videoId}.description: A collection containing all streamable video records
